channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Yamaha PB4000RA Candy Apple Red - Made in Japan — $895
item.description:
$895 · Very Good · Ear Friendly

Candy Apple Red Yamaha PB400RA - Made in Japan - 1985-1986

This is a beautiful Yamaha P Bass with great paint job and super dark Rosewood fretboard. It's obvious this bass was made with great thought and care. It's a real time capsule. At just under 8 lbs, this bass has a wonderful look and feel---and it sounds great. Impressive all around.

It does have playing wear as well as some bumps and bruises. That said, overall, is in very nice condition for a ~40 year old instrument. I've done my best to take photos that accurately represent the instrument.

Due to the increased cost of shipping and tariffs, obtaining Japanese instruments has become more expensive. This is a great opportunity to purchase a very nice instrument at a reasonable price.

Please message with questions.

Weight: ~ 7.98 lbs

Sale includes: Bass and gig bag.

Selling this bass used, as described. No returns.  

I am careful when packing, quick to ship and all shipments are insured. 

This instrument will need to be setup and adjusted to your tastes/preferences. No under-the-table sales. CONUS shipping only. All orders will be shipped---no local pickups.

Thanks for looking and feel free to message me with any questions. If you liked this instrument, I encourage you to check out my other listings and/or "follow" my shop to keep up with new listings and updates.

item.title: Rickenbacker Chris Squier - 4001CD 1991 - Cream — $7,748.79
item.description:
$7,748.79 · Very Good · LEX' Axe Bizarre

1991 - RICKENBACKER 4001CS Bass.

Chris Squire (YES) Singnature Model.

This bass is highly collectable and comes with the C.O.A. #179/1000.

Plays like a dream and delivers the most incredible tones live and in studio. Was played and taken care of from the start! A beautiful piece for players, collectors and YES fans alike.

item.title: Wal Mach II Left-Handed 5-String 2001 - High Gloss-Polyester — $12,500
item.description:
$12,500 · Excellent · The Bottom End, LLC

I am selling this custom left-handed 5-string Wal Bass Guitar. It features a burled chestnut top and back, mahogany core, a Macassar ebony fretboard, and gold hardware. There is currently a five year waiting list for a new Wal. Although the pictures show that the bass is strung right-handed, I will switch them prior to shipping.

item.title: Epiphone Toby Deluxe IV Bass 2011/2012 - Translucent Black — $210.23
item.description:
$210.23 · Excellent · joniswolf14

Only been played a short time.

Like brand new.

Throwing in lead, strap, manuel and assessories aswell.

Brilliant tuner but needs battery which is easy enough to find.

I can show more pics if wanted?

item.title: Fender Squier Affinity Series Precision Bass PJ — $415
item.description:
$415 · Excellent · Arie'una's Gear Outlet

Selling a brand new, unplayed Squier Affinity Precision Bass in Lake Placid Blue, bundled with a brand new Fender FB620 premium padded gig bag.

The bass is in flawless condition and still has the factory protective plastic wrap on the pickups, pickguard, and tuning keys.

Buying this setup new at retail costs $465

before tax ($380 for the bass and $85 for the bag. Selling the complete bundle here for a discount. Everything is already securely packed and will ship together safely in a single guitar shipping box.

Specifications:

Body: Poplar

Neck: Maple

Fretboard: Indian Laurel (20 frets)

Handedness: Right-Handed

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass V — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Excellent · Phillip's Gear Outlet

This thing has never been played. The plastic is on the pick ups, tuners and pick guard.

item.title: 2026 Rickenbacker 4003 - Jetglo — $2,299
item.description:
$2,299 · Very Good · Kell’s Gear Outlet

2026 Rickenbacker 4003 in the classic Jetglo finish, proudly made in the USA. This is the latest version featuring the updated V2 bridge, slimmer neck profile, single dual-action truss rod, and the new bridge pickup surround/thumb rest configuration without the traditional pickup cover.

This bass has been professionally set up by Eric’s Guitar Shop in Los Angeles and plays effortlessly with a straight neck, low action, and fully functional electronics. It weighs 9.7 lbs.

Cosmetically, expect a few light surface marks consistent with careful playing and ownership.

Included with the bass are the original Rickenbacker hard shell case, all original case candy/documentation, an additional black pickguard, and a matching black truss rod cover, giving you the option to change the look if desired.

This is an outstanding example of a modern 4003 that delivers the unmistakable Rickenbacker growl and looks every bit as iconic as it sounds.

item.title: Fender Japan JB62-WAL Jazz Bass MIJ Made in Japan Ash Body Walnut 4.63kg w/Gig Bag — $699
item.description:
$699 · Good · FUKUDA STUDIO × ONE MAKE

Fender Japan JB62-WAL Jazz Bass made in Japan.


This bass has been professionally inspected, cleaned, adjusted, and is fully functional.


Specifications:

• Model: JB62-WAL

• Made in Japan

• Ash body with beautiful walnut finish

• Rosewood fingerboard

• Maple neck

• Weight: 4.63kg (10.21 lbs)


This instrument delivers the classic Fender Jazz Bass tone with strong attack, clear definition, and rich low end.


Cosmetically, the bass shows normal signs of use including scratches, dents, finish wear, and hardware tarnish consistent with its age. Please review all photos carefully for its condition.


Maintenance performed before listing:

• Neck checked

• Truss rod checked

• Frets inspected

• Electronics tested

• Fingerboard cleaned

• Frets polished

• Body cleaned

• Action adjusted

• Intonation adjusted

• Play tested


Includes a gig bag.


Ships securely from Japan.

item.title: Squier FSR Classic Vibe Late '60s Jazz Bass 2022 Lake Placid Blue — $299
item.description:
$299 · Very Good · Ear Friendly

Lake Placid Blue Classic Vibe Late '60s Jazz Bass.

This is a very nice bass----beautiful and sounds great. It's in great shape and has seen very little use. Has plastic protection neck plate. That said, I'm sure there are some minor blemishes.

Weight: ~ 9.05lbs

Sale includes: Bass only.

Selling this bass used, as described. No returns. Please message with questions.

I am careful when packing, quick to ship and all shipments are insured. 

This instrument will need to be setup and adjusted to your tastes/preferences. No under-the-table sales. CONUS shipping only. All orders will be shipped---no local pickups.

Thanks for looking and feel free to message me with any questions. If you liked this instrument, I encourage you to check out my other listings and/or "follow" my shop to keep up with new listings and updates.

item.title: Fender Squier Classic Vibe 2026 — $475
item.description:
$475 · Very Good · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

Fender designed Squier Classic Vibe Active 70s jazz bass 5

  • Poplar body
  • Maple neck
  • Indian laurel fretboard
  • Noiseless pickups
  • Active preamp (volume, blend, tone, bass/treble stack)
  • 34" scale
  • 19mm string spacing
  • 20 frets
  • nut width 1.875"

item.title: Kay K2B 1970's - Sunburst bass guitar great shape — $635
item.description:
$635 · Very Good · Nflmobile1

Really excellent shape, very light cosmetic wear only. Looks and plays great, appears to be all original. Comes in the original cardboard case which is starting to come apart.

item.title: Dean EABC Cutaway Acoustic-Electric Bass 2010s - Natural — $200
item.description:
$200 · Fair · Eric's Gee-Tara

Bridge is pulling away needs reflux. Otherwise good condition

item.title: Fender Standard Jazz Bass 2001-2004 - Black — $699
item.description:
$699 · Excellent · Mark's Bass Gear

Fender Standard Jazz Bass – Made in Mexico 

Color: Black

Fingerboard: Rosewood

Pickups: Passive

Weight: 9.6 lbs

Condition: Excellent

This is a very clean, lightly‑used Fender Standard Jazz Bass (MIM) with a 2001 serial number (MZ114743) that was purchased new in 2004. Fender serial numbers often reflect the production year rather than the retail sale year, so the serial and purchase date differ — completely normal for MIM instruments from this era.

The bass has seen very light use since purchase and has been well cared for. It recently received a full setup and is strung with new DR Sunbeams. Everything is 100% original — no modifications.

Condition Details

Body: Black gloss finish is exceptionally clean — no haze, no fine scratches, no swirling.

Bridge area: One small scratch in the saddle area (cosmetic only).

Neck plate: A few tiny (~2mm) imperfections on one corner.

Chrome hardware: No pitting, corrosion, or dulling.

Pickguard: No swirling.

Neck: No back‑of‑neck wear.

Frets: No visible fret wear.

Tuners: Turn smoothly, no binding.

Nut & Saddles: Clean slots, saddles adjust normally.

Electronics: Pots are clean and quiet.

Truss rod: Adjusted during setup; turns normally.

Playability & Tone

Classic passive Jazz Bass tone — articulate, punchy, and versatile. The setup and fresh strings make it ready to play immediately.

Included

Fender gig bag (clean, fully functional)

This is a great example of a well‑preserved MIM Standard Jazz Bass, especially rare in this condition for a black finish. It’s ready for stage, studio, or home use.

item.title: Peavey G Bass — $850
item.description:
$850 · Excellent · Larry's Boutique

For sale is a 4 string Peavey G bass in EXCELLENT condition with minimal cosmetic wear, only light scratches from regular use. EXCELLENT condition for its age. All electronics work as they should. The specs from Peavey are shown in the pictures. The neck is graphite/composite. Strung with rounds.

Includes non original gig bag

Approx: 9lbs

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003 2012 - Present - Mapleglo — $1,900
item.description:
$1,900 · Excellent · Anthony's Gear Bazaar

Description:

​Up for sale is a beautiful Rickenbacker 4003 in excellent, close-to-new condition. It has been meticulously cared for, plays beautifully with low action, and delivers that classic Ric punch.

​Specs & Upgrades:

  • ​Strings: Brand new D'Addario Chrome 9050 Stainless Steel Flatwounds for a smooth, deep, vintage thump.
  • ​Modifications: The treble bridge pickup cover has been cleanly removed for a much more comfortable playing experience. The original cover is fully intact and included in the case, so you can easily reinstall it if you prefer the stock look.
  • ​Case: Original Rickenbacker hardshell case (OHSC) included in excellent condition.

​Local Buyers:

If you are local to the area and a serious buyer, I am happy to let you plug it into my rig to test it out before purchasing.

item.title: Ibanez SRA550, Transparent Black — $345
item.description:
$345 · Excellent · Aaron's Gear Garage

Ibanez SRA550 in excellent condition. Very light signs of use, no significant blemishes. All components stock. Strung with D'addario flats.

Weight is 7 lbs 14 oz

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1972 - Sunburst — $4,650
item.description:
$4,650 · Very Good · Southside Guitars

This Fender Precision Bass was made in the USA in 1972. It shows play wear, but there is no structural damage. The bass is all original except for the pots. It weighs 8 pounds 8 ounces. This bass has been pro-setup in our store and is in excellent playing condition. It comes with the original case.

item.title: Fender Victor Bailey Artist Series Signature Jazz Bass V 2006 - 2011 - Natural — $4,723.07
item.description:
$4,723.07 · Excellent · Jennie's Gear Outlet

This is in my opinion the best jazz bass fender ever made

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird IV Electric Bass Guitar Made In Korea — $400
item.description:
$400 · Excellent · Invisible Unknown Gear Shop

Epiphone Thunderbird IV Electric Bass Guitar Made in Korea

bass is in great condition could use new strings

this bass was made in March of 1998 MIK

item.title: Sterling SUB StingRay Ray4 2021 - Present - Trans Black Satin — $219
item.description:
$219 · Very Good · Jackson's G.A.S. Station

Only owner. Very good condition, everything works.

item.title: Ibanez 2657ZB P-Style Bass 1976 - Burned Ash — $850
item.description:
$850 · Good · TechEx

Ibanez Silver Series P-Bass. Low serial # dates to 77. This is my favorite era for lawsuit era Japanese basses, and I have quite a few. In my opinion, the quality of these instruments is superior to the post-CBS US made versions. Excellent low action and playability. Beautiful natural finish, upgraded Leo Kwan Badass II Bridge. Some chips and dings as shown in photos, the neck chips can be repaired with a clearcoat touch up. I’m terrible at finish/paint repair so I played it as-is and honestly hardly noticed. This bass was recently set up with a new set of flatwounds. All electronics were cleaned. Frets are level and still have a lot of life. This bass growls.
Original bridge and recently removed steel strings included. Ships in a new roadrunner hard shell case, boxed with plenty of bubble wrap. I ship with Reverb Safe Ship, someone will need to sign for the package on delivery.

item.title: Ibanez GSR200B-WK — $293.93
item.description:
$293.93 · Brand New · Music World Brilon

Ibanez 4-String GSR200B-WK - Weatherd Black

  • Korpus: Nyatoh
  • Hals: Ahorn
  • Halsprofil: GSR4
  • Griffbrett: Jatoba
  • Griffbrettradius: 305 mm ( 12')

item.title: Warwick Streamette / Corvette LTD 2001 Natural Birdseye Top — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Very Good · Jamal's Bass & Gear Outlet

Legend has it that a batch of streamers were made and quickly misplaced in 1990 or 91. In the process of moving operations in the late 90's the bodies were found, necks cut off, and made into what you see here, with necks from 2001. 

These will be the only arch top, contoured corvettes you will ever see!!! (until they decide to produce them, which may never happen). 

****Only around 50 of these exist****


It does have normal signs of wear as expected on a bass this age, but has been very well taken care of and is in excellent condition. Everything works as it should and has been looked over by a local shop. A full set up has been done, all 4 tuners were replaced with Warwick branded gold tuners, and it is strung up with a new set of DR Sunbeams. This bass plays like an absolute dream and has that signature Warwick growl. I guarantee you will not find another bass like this anytime soon. Owning this bass is quite literally owning a piece of Warwick history. I really really love this bass, but I unfortunately have to thin the heard so I will be open to offers. Message me with any questions.

Specs:


Etimoe body w/Ovangkol strip down middle of body

Birdseye Maple top

Ovangkol Neck

Wenge Fingerboard

MEC Mirrored P pickups

MEC 2-band EQ, active/passive

item.title: Hondo Alien 1980 - Green — $550
item.description:
$550 · Excellent · Marla's

Vintage 80’s Hondo Alien headless travel bass. Very unique sound to it. No longer need talking up space and could look super cool on display or a unique stage piece.

item.title: Regal P bass 1980’s - Trippy Sunflower — $420
item.description:
$420 · Good · Haku Records

This is a 1980-90’s regal p bass that I handpainted and hand wired. Fully setup new strings plays awesome! This would be a great studio bass or even for live shows! I’ve always wanted to put flats on this bass but I’ll leave that up to you!

item.title: Sterling SUB Series Stingray 4 Left-Handed 2020s - Sunburst — $290
item.description:
$290 · Excellent · Max's Gear

Music Man Sterling SUB Series Stingray 4 Left-Handed for sale. In great condition, and sounds good. No major problems with sound nor big marks/scratches.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress 5-String 24-Fret Modern Bass Roasted Maple Fingerboard 5-String Solid Olympic White — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Excellent · Jamal's Bass & Gear Outlet

This is a Sadowsky Metro Express 24-fret Modern 5-string bass. This bass features a lightweight Okoume body, a roasted maple neck and roasted maple fingerboard w/ a 12” radius and the renowned Sadowsky onboard preamp.

Specs:

  • Body Shape: Modern / Sleek undersized body with deep cutaways
  • Body Material: Solid Okoume
  • Neck Material: Roasted Maple (C-shape)
  • Neck Joint: Bolt-on
  • Fingerboard Material: Roasted Maple
  • Fingerboard Radius: 12"
  • Number of Frets: 24 Nickel-Silver frets
  • Fret Dimensions: Width: 2.4 mm (0.094"), Height: 1.3 mm (0.051")
  • Scale Length: 34" (Long Scale)
  • Nut Width: 1.875" (47.5 mm)
  • Nut Material: Sadowsky Just-A-Nut III
  • Pickups: Passive Sadowsky Soapbar Humbuckers (Modern Position)
  • Preamp: Active Sadowsky 2-way Electronics (Bass/Treble boost)
  • Controls: Volume, Balance, Treble, Bass
  • Push/Pull Function: Pulling the Bass knob bypasses the active preamp
  • Bridge: Sadowsky bridge with quick string release
  • String Spacing (Bridge): 18 mm
  • Tuners: Sadowsky Light Open-gear
  • Strings: .045 - .130 (DR Pure Blues Nickel)
  • Hardware Finish: Chrome
  • Security Locks: Sadowsky S-Security Locks
  • Case: Includes extremely padded Sadowsky rigid softshell case / PortaBag

item.title: Pedulla Rapture 2005 Fretted 5 String JJ — $2,550
item.description:
$2,550 · Very Good · Chris’ Gear

2005 Pedulla Rapture 5 string fretted bass


Parting with my Rapture after a many years. This bass has always sounded and played great. Typical FOH comments are "Best sounding bass I've every heard", etc., The time has come to part with it, as I'm not playing as much and it needs to go to someone who can fully utilize is beautiful sound and playability.

Maple body and neck, with JJ style pick-ups: Michael Pedulla's proprietary Bartolini pickps & preamp. currently strung with Thomastik-Infeld Jazz Bass nickel wound flats for a project, but I'm including actual NEW Pedulla stainless steel round-wound strings (this is what Pedulla strung these with band-new). I must say, with stainless round-wounds the B string is the best sounding I've heard in a 34" scale bass by far.

There are a few minor blemishes I've a tried to point out as much as possible. Including a Pedulla Hard shell case, truss rod wrench along with the Pedulla strings.

Shipping to US only; local pick up in SF Bay area can be arranged.

item.title: Squier Affinity Precision Bass 1999 - 2012 - White — $130
item.description:
$130 · Good · Shangri La Studio

Squire Passive P Bass in white with black pick guard and sticker, see pictures. This bass plays great.  I love the neck.  Shipped with tape wound strings and used Fender gig bag. I hate to see this bass go to a new home, I loved playing this bass.  It was my first bass and I learned on it.  It has been played well and gigged. There are dings and scratches, one nick in the fretboard does not interfere with playability, see pictures. My second child is in college, and I have too many basses, so it is time to find a new home for this one and help support the college fund. If this bass speaks to you, I will pack it well and ship it quickly.  Ask if you have any questions.

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified Jaguar Bass Special 2011 - 2018 - 3-Color Sunburst — $280
item.description:
$280 · Very Good · Shangri La Studio

Squire Jaguar Active Bass in three color burst.  This bass plays great.  I love the neck.  The preamp gives various tones.  Shipped with a new 9v battery and Fender gig bag. I hate to see this bass go to a new home, I loved playing this bass.  My second child is in college, and I have too many basses, so it is time to find a new home for this one and help support the college fund.  If this bass speaks to you, I will pack it well and ship it quickly.Ask if you have any questions.

item.title: Sadowsky Metro Express 2026 - Champagne — $949
item.description:
$949 · Excellent · Ernesto's Shop

  • Beautiful Champagne color
  • White pearl pick guard
  • Sadowsky p/j picips
  • Roasted maple neck
  • 9.7lb
  • Sadowsky gig bag provided

item.title: Wal MKI 1984 - Great Condition with Wal HSC — $14,000
item.description:
$14,000 · Very Good · JC's Gear Garage

This is probably the hardest instrument for me to sell. I am selling my 1984 Wal Mk I bass. I bought this from Tully Kennedy, Jason Aldean's bassist in 2022. This bass was originally a fretless. The serial number is W2331. You can look it up on the Wal serial number website. I think the previous seller bought it as a fretless from the Low End Bass Shop in Nashville and converted it to a fretted neck. I have never owned a Wal before and, trust me, it lives up to all the hype.

I think the current wait for a new Wal is well over 4 years. And even though it will be a new Wal, it will not be a vintage Wal from 1984 which is the era that you really want if you want a bona fide Wal. You really will not find a better 1984 Wal Mk I out there.

There a couple of nicks on the finish. I have sent pics of those. Specifically, there's a spot on the front left horn of the body and a small spot on the low string side in between the two pickups. There's also a few very tiny blemishes on the inside the horns of the bass. Nothing major and no deep cuts in the finish. This bass is in great cosmetic shape for a 42 year old bass!

The only reason I am selling this is because I am not gigging right now and it makes no sense for me to have this very expensive bass just sitting around not being played or earning money for me. I want this bass to go to someone who will use it and love it and put this top calibre instrument to work.

I am limiting selling this to buyers in the continental United States due to the value of this instrument and difficulty of tracking certain out of country shipments. If someone outside the United States really wants this, you can contact me and it will be up to me in my discretion if I want to ship it to your location. If I sell this to someone out of the country, the buyer will have to pay for the shipping and insurance to insure the full value of the instrument and must declare the full value of the purchase to customs.

All electronics work as they should. Neck is great and frets are in great shape. I will post pics of the Wal case in the next couple of days as the case (not the bass) is currently in storage.

This item is being sold "as is" but it is in great condition.

I am not in a hurry to sell this but am hoping to find the right buyer and price to put this in the hands of a great bassist who will appreciate this bass.

I try to answer all questions in 24 hours or less.

Thank you for looking and good luck!

item.title: Squier Contemporary Active Jazz Bass V HH 2018 - Present - Black — $395
item.description:
$395 · Very Good · Shangri La Studio

Squier Contemporary HH Jazz Bass in metallic purple.  This bass plays great.  I love the neck.  The B string is awesome!!!  The preamp gives various tones and can be quite aggressive.  Shipped with a new 9v battery and a new fender gig bag. I never connected with a five string, so this bass spent the last few years as a case queen. My second child is in college, and I have too many basses, so it is time to find a new home for this one and help support the college fund.  If this bass speaks to you, I will pack it well and ship it quickly.  Ask if you have any questions.

item.title: Used 1998 Fender Standard Jazz Bass V 5-String Fretless Bass, Brown Sunburst — $650
item.description:
$650 · Very Good · Hayden

late 90s fender fretless 5 string with black flats.

item.title: DeArmond Pilot Plus Bass — $200
item.description:
$200 · Good · Angelica's Gear Garage

Nice and light. Great gig bass.

item.title: Schecter Diamond Series Custom 4 Mid 2000’s - Burgundy — $495
item.description:
$495 · Very Good · Paul's Gear Outlet

Schecter Diamond Series C-4 Bass. Comes with hard case. Made in South Korea

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 5 H 2003 - Blue Dawn — $2,499
item.description:
$2,499 · Very Good · MB's Gear Inventory

2003 Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 5 H in Blue Dawn finish is in great condition with light use. Pearl white pick guard is subtle but really pops in good lighting. Manufactured in California, USA. Has one small knick near the bridge under the E string, which is the only physical blemish on the entire guitar. Coming from a smoke-free home and a climate controlled environment that has been suitable for a collection of guitars. This bass sounds great and is all in working order.

Does not include original case. Durable Music Man gig bag will be included.

item.title: LeCompte 8EZ-4 - Transparent Black & Clear — $2,849
item.description:
$2,849 · Brand New · LeCompte Electric Bass

LeCompte 8EZ-4 Bass

34” scale
Paulownia body wings with hard ash core and maple stripes
Multi-section curly maple top w/ mac. ebony veneer stripes, black tint with matte finish
Maple neck
Maple fingerboard with ghost block inlays
24 Evo gold frets
Zero fret, Corian nut
Dual-action truss rod
Gotoh lightweight tuners
Gotoh bridge
Trickfish custom split-coil pickups built by me
Trickfish IPA 3-band preamp
18V power
Dunlop Straplocks

DR Strings
Gigbag
7lbs 13oz

This bass was built as an homage to the Ibanez Musician basses of yore and displayed at the NAMM 2026 show in the Trickfish booth.

Now the ugly part…<gulp>…there's a small bark inclusion on the back of the neck. It appeared out of nowhere after many, many hours of labor on the neck. I had to run with it due to the NAMM show deadline. You can’t feel or see the inclusion in playing position. Some have called this “character”, right? Regardless, the neck is extremely stable and is covered with a warranty.

It's a great sounding and playing bass with modern twist on a classic design.

Discounted: $2849, includes shipping in the US.

item.title: PRS SE Kingfisher Bass 2014 - 2019 - Natural — $580
item.description:
$580 · Very Good · Shangri La Studio

PRS Kingfisher Bass in Natural.  This bass plays great.  I love the neck.  Passive bass will be shipped with the original gig bag.  I hate to see this bass go to a new home, I played it a ton although it was mostly in the studio.  It was never a main gig instrument.  My second child is in college, and I have too many basses so it is time to find a new home for this one and help support the college fund.  If this bass speaks to you, I will pack it well and ship it quickly. Ask if you have any questions.

item.title: Nash MB-63 Mustang Bass Guitar — $2,450
item.description:
$2,450 · Excellent · GroovinNC

This is a USA made Nash Guitars MB-63 Mustang bass with hard shell case, original paperwork, and comes with extra set of flat wound strings (see photos). If you know about these then you know…

The bass has only been used for bedroom practice for a total of maybe 5 hours but my other Nash precision basses get all gig work so time to this little gem go to fund a new amp :-)

item.title: Fender TNB-110SPL TNB SPL J-Craft Thinline Telecaster Bass Special 4-string Semi-Hollowbody Bass 2002 - 2004 - Blue Violet Burst — $1,799
item.description:
$1,799 · Very Good · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Approximate weight: 8 lbs 2 oz
  • Nut width: 1.52"
  • Neck thickness: @ 1st fret: 0.81" / @ 12th fret: 0.94"
  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has likely acquired surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • A generic gig bag [not pictured] will be included.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: ESP LTD B-206SM 2019 - Present - Natural Satin — $346
item.description:
$346 · Good · Shangri La Studio

LTD six string bass. Good condition with signs of wear. There is a sticker on the back (see pictures).  Shipped with a new 9v battery and new gig bag.  I never connected with a 6-string bass, not for me so this one needs a new home.  I am including a brand-new set of strings and a brand-new gig bag. My second child is in college, and I have too many basses, so it is time to find a new home for this one and help support the college fund.  If this bass speaks to you, I will pack it well and ship it quickly.  Ask if you have any questions.

item.title: Fender CB-60SCE Mid-2020s - Gloss Black — $437
item.description:
$437 · Excellent · AEdmonds1125

Excellent shape, played very little. No nicks, dings, or scratches. Smoke and pet free home!

item.title: Rob Allen Deep 5 Fretless Bass Guitar — $3,875
item.description:
$3,875 · Very Good · Chris’ Gear

Rob Allen Deep Hollow 5 Fretless

Absolutely beautiful sounding Rob deep five fretless. I’m not playing much anymore so it needs to go to someone who can truly appreciate and use such a gorgeous sounding and looking instrument.


Rob bass guitars are no longer available to special order Direct as of several years ago. Now, generally the only way to get a deep five model is by waiting for Rob to build one and then purchasing it once he up for sale on his site.


This beautiful 34 inch scale Deep Hollow Five base has a gorgeous spotted maple top deep. Deep Hollow Five bases are highly sought after because they have the ability (with proper technique) to sound like an upright base due to their hollow construction and their piezo pickup system. This bass is in very good shape with only three small dings as I have tried to show in the pictures. No, this is not something that in a case and collected dust, I played, gigged and recorded with it and always sounded great and recorded beautifully. The neck is in great shape with no dings or chips at all in the neck. There are stickers that have been applied to avoid any damage to the spotted top by fingernails, but of course you could remove these. It comes a ProTec case as shown.

I will ship only to the US. Please reach out with any questions that you may have.

item.title: Jackson X Series SBX V 5-String Spectra Bass 2022 Electric Blue — $666.22
item.description:
$666.22 · Excellent · Razvan S. (HGE Contraptions)

Basically a mint condition bass. A similar one now at Thomann is 686 Euro.

No noticeable dents or dings that I can see, and no scratches, maybe fine ones. Rarely played it myself (15-18 times?). It was bought out of curiosity, but I no longer have need for it (I am a guitar player mostly).

Any imperfections you might find are there stock as this was bought as new by a previous owner, and it arrived and remained in the same condition that it is now. I literally hardly touched it, and I even removed some original foil off of some elements myself. Fret ends feel ok and don't appear to scratch, normal end feel.

Added a Youtube link with an Iphone video recording, the bass was plugged in a Focusrite 2i2 3rd gen, going to Yamaha HS-8 monitors, the sound captured is the room sound.

Shipping in its original cardboard box to the European Union only, tracked. The shipping cost is just an estimate, so please contact me prior to buying, giving me your location and postal code, so that I can give you the real ship cost. No returns. For any more detailed pics and concerns feel free to message me.

SPECS:

  • 35" scale length
  • Poplar body
  • Through-body maple neck with graphite reinforcement and scarf joint
  • 12"-16" compound radius bound laurel fingerboard with 24 jumbo frets and white dot inlays
  • Dual passive Jackson medium-output humbucking pickups
  • Volume control (with push/pull selector for active/passive options), blend control, 3-band EQ (active only) and two-way toggle switch (pickup coil split) 2-way toggle switch (pickup coil split)
  • Jackson HiMass™ bridge
  • Jackson sealed die-cast tuners
  • Electric Blue finish with black hardware
  • Unique 3x2 black headstock with "J" logo
  • Made in Indonesia

item.title: 2022 Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5 H with Rosewood Fretboard - Burnt Ends — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Excellent · Tim's Used Stuff

Up for sale is my 2022 Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay Special 5 H in the beautiful Burnt Ends finish. This bass features the roasted maple neck, rosewood fingerboard, ash body, and single H pickup configuration.

It has been adult owned, well cared for, and is in excellent condition. Everything functions exactly as it should with no issues. Includes the original Music Man Mono gig bag. Including Schaller Strap Locks and an Ernie Ball strap.

If you’re looking for the classic StingRay tone with the lighter weight and refinements of the Special series, this is an outstanding example.
